bird.name: 婆羅洲孔雀雉
bird.summary: 婆羅洲孔雀雉（Polyplectron schleiermacheri）是一種中等身形的雉。牠們長50厘米，呈赤褐色及有黑色斑點，冠及頸背的羽毛很長，下身黑色，紅色的面部沒有羽毛，瞳孔藍色。胸部呈金屬藍綠色，喉嚨及上胸中間白色。牠們有22條尾羽，都有藍綠色的大眼斑紋，示愛時會展…

relations.subject: 婆羅洲孔雀雉
relations.evidence: Because of ongoing habitat loss, small population size, and limited range, the Bornean peacock-pheasant is evaluated as Endangered on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 婆羅洲孔雀雉
relations.evidence: Because of ongoing habitat loss, small population size, and limited range, the Bornean peacock-pheasant is evaluated as Endangered on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species
relations.object_summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。
